title: JMI Notification 2026 - Apply for Project Research Scientist II Posts
description: Jamia Millia Islamia (JMI) has announced the official notification for the recruitment of Various Project Research Scientist II Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation, M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the JMI Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 that you can all apply fo...
